-->
::: {.content-visible when-profile="en"}
# Introduction {.unnumbered}

{{< include docs/en/intro.qmd >}}
:::

::: {.content-visible when-profile="pt"}
# Introdução {.unnumbered}

{{< include docs/pt/intro.qmd >}}
:::
